summary: VIP Interactive Features Testing Complete - All critical backend APIs working correctly. Frontend code structure verified for interactive modals (whale detail, trader detail, course detail). Profile navigation and Messages navigation properly implemented.

issues: Pre-existing TypeScript type warnings in style arrays - not blocking runtime functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VIP Hub handlers (handleWhalePress, handleTraderPress, handleCoursePress) correctly implemented at lines 329, 356, 362
Modals for whale detail (line 1095), trader detail (line 1154), course detail (line 1243) properly structured
Profile navigation: router.push('/messages') at line 198, router.push('/user/' + user?.id) at line 214
Community author navigation: router.push(/user/${post.author_id}) at line 549, 764, 813
MOCKED DATA in VIP Hub: Whale history (whaleHistory state, line 154) and trader trades (getTraderMockTrades function, line 368) are mocked on frontend
Backend APIs return proper data structure for modals - all required fields present

success_rate.backend: 100% (11 passed, 3 skipped - non-VIP access control tests skipped due to no test user)
success_rate.frontend: Code Review Only - Expo tunnel unstable, code structure verified syntactically correct

context_for_next_testing_agent: All VIP APIs working correctly. Frontend interactive features (modals) properly implemented in code. Expo/Ngrok tunnel is unstable (known infrastructure issue). Profile and Messages navigation routes exist and are connected to correct API endpoints.
